title: becium grandiflorum var. albostellatum
intro: Becium grandiflorum var. albostellatum, also known as White-leafed Pygmy Nasturtium, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically made into teas or infusions, are commonly used in African folk medicine for their therapeutic effects.
